prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to water quality monitoring and environmental regulations specific to England and Wales, as indicated by references to the Environment Agency and the Environmental Targets (Water) (England) Regulations 2023. It does not apply to Scotland, which has separate regulatory frameworks and bodies for environmental monitoring and management.
